identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a tactical, elite Academic Intelligence System that feels like a high-frequency trading terminal for careers.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech Trading + Cyber Warfare + Academic Rigor.
Emotion First: The user should feel like an 'Operator' in a command center.
Content is King: Data density is the aesthetic. No fluff.
Zoom In: Focus on the 'Signal' (high-value metrics).
Negative Space: Use it to group data, not just for air.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in dark mode.

typography.instructions: Use Barlow Condensed for all headings to give a 'military/industrial' feel. Use JetBrains Mono for all data, numbers, and code snippets. Use Inter for long-form reading text.

grid_system.landing: Mode A: The Tetris Grid (12 columns, mixed spans)
grid_system.dashboard: Mode B: High Density Grid (4 columns, tight gaps)

variants.primary: bg-primary text-black hover:bg-primary/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm
variants.secondary: border border-primary/50 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm
variants.ghost: text-muted-foreground hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm

cards.base: bg-surface border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden

inputs.base: bg-black/20 border-b border-white/20 focus:border-primary text-white placeholder-white/30 rounded-none px-0 py-2 transition-colors

navigation.base: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5

effects.name: Scanlines
effects.css: background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 2px, 3px 100%; pointer-events: none;

effects.name: Tech Border
effects.css: position: relative; &::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; right: 0; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-right: 2px solid #00C2FF; border-bottom: 2px solid #00C2FF; }

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all iconography. Prefer sharp, geometric icons (e.g., 'Square', 'Triangle', 'Activity', 'Terminal', 'Cpu'). Avoid rounded/soft icons.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use purple or teal for CTAs. Use Electric Blue (#00C2FF) or Neon Green (#16F2A5).
DO NOT use Inter for Headings. Use Barlow Condensed.
DO NOT center everything. Use asymmetry and grid alignment.
DO NOT use gradients > 20% opacity. Keep it matte/flat with subtle noise.
DO NOT use rounded buttons (rounded-full). Use sharp (rounded-sm) or pill (rounded-none).
Marketing Pages: Custom HTML/Tailwind. Dashboards: Customized Shadcn.
Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling on marketing pages.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a Tactical Academic Intelligence System. Think 'Bloomberg Terminal meets Cyberpunk'. Your goal is to make the user feel like an elite operator. Use the provided color palette strictly. Use the provided fonts. Follow the layout rules. When in doubt, make it look 'technical' and 'dense' rather than 'clean' and 'simple'.
